Selected Work

Tableau Python Pandas

Netflix Data Visualization Dashboard

Built an interactive analytics dashboard on Netflix's Movies & TV Shows dataset. Designed KPI-driven insights: content distribution by genre, ratings analysis, release trends by year, and country-wise availability maps. End-to-end: data cleaning in Python through to Tableau visuals.

View on GitHub →
Tableau Python Jupyter

NYC Airbnb Market Analysis

Data analytics capstone on the NYC Airbnb 2019 market using 48K+ listings. Performed full ETL, statistical analysis, and built Tableau dashboards tracking Revenue Potential Index, borough-wise pricing, room-type performance, and occupancy demand patterns.

View on GitHub →
Python Tableau SQL

Amazon Electronics Sales Analysis

Capstone project analyzing Amazon Electronics sales data to uncover revenue drivers, category performance, and customer purchasing patterns. Built end-to-end ETL with Python and delivered a Tableau dashboard for actionable business recommendations.
